title: Impoting Excel spreadsheet with formulas

posts.author: Mutleyk9 (Phil Sayer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all.
Would it be possible for tech guys at Monday.com to look into a way of importing excel spreadsheets along with the formulas?
At the time, we are only able to upload the visible content in an Excel spreadsheet, which is okay, but not ideal. Far better if it we could alter the quantity of an item and the value automatically adjusted.

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mutleyk9 ,

You may try our Smart Spreadsheet for monday app for the case.

With the help of the Smart Spreadsheet for monday you’ll be able to import/export your Excel data (in xlsx or csv formats) and boards with items as well. Then you may work with the data as a fully functional spreadsheet (filtration, cell formulas, conditional formatting, pivot tables, charts, etc.) securely in one place without switching between platforms.

Try a free trial now.

Please feel free to ask any questions about the app. We’ll be more than happy to assist you.

Stiltsoft,
Katerina Kovriga
